description: Saved view management panel for TmDataTable and TmMultiViewList, supporting personal and tenant-scoped views with create, edit, delete, and apply operations. Includes a modal for configuring view name, scope, visible columns, grouping, and filters via IDataTableViewProvider.

parameters.name: OnViewApplied
parameters.description: Callback when a view is applied.

parameters.name: GetCurrentView
parameters.description: Callback to get current view state.

parameters.name: GetCurrentFilters
parameters.description: Callback to get current active filters.

parameters.name: OnCreateView
parameters.description: Callback when creating a new view.

parameters.name: FilterDefinitions
parameters.description: Filter definitions for the filter builder.

parameters.name: AvailableGroupableColumns
parameters.description: Available columns for grouping selection in the view modal.

parameters.name: DisplayResolver
parameters.description: Universal display resolver for field labels and enum filter values. Typically passed from parent TmDataTable or TmMultiViewList. Flows to FilterBuilder.

parameters.name: CanCreateTenantViews
parameters.description: Whether the user can create tenant-wide views.

parameters.name: CurrentUserId
parameters.description: Current user's identifier for personal views.

examples.title: View manager integrated with data table
examples.code:
<TmViewManager Provider="@viewProvider"
               ViewContext="employees"
               OnViewApplied="ApplyView"
               GetCurrentView="GetCurrentTableView"
               AvailableColumns="@availableColumns"
               FilterDefinitions="@filterDefs"
               CanCreateTenantViews="true"
               CurrentUserId="@userId"
               CurrentTenantId="@tenantId" />

examples.title: View manager with DisplayResolver for localized filter labels
examples.code:
<TmViewManager Provider="@viewProvider"
               ViewContext="orders"
               OnViewApplied="ApplyView"
               GetCurrentView="GetCurrentTableView"
               AvailableColumns="@availableColumns"
               FilterDefinitions="@filterDefs"
               DisplayResolver="ResolveDisplay"
               CanCreateTenantViews="true"
               CurrentUserId="@userId"
               CurrentTenantId="@tenantId" />

@code {
    // DisplayResolver flows from TmViewManager → TmFilterBuilder → TmFilterChip.
    // Usually you set DisplayResolver on the parent TmDataTable or TmMultiViewList
    // and it flows automatically. Direct usage shown here for standalone scenarios.
    private string? ResolveDisplay(string fieldName, string? rawValue)
    {
        if (rawValue is null)
            return fieldName switch { "Status" => "Order Status", "Priority" => "Priority", _ => null };
        return (fieldName, rawValue) switch
        {
            ("Status", "Pending") => "Pending",
            ("Status", "Shipped") => "Shipped",
            ("Status", "Delivered") => "Delivered",
            _ => null
        };
    }
}
